text.title: Regulatory Uncertainty Buffer Decision Tree
text.summary: Tree mapping jurisdiction + signal vs threshold to buffer% / pause / escalate-to-legal. Every leaf references a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`.

decision-tree.root-question: signal is a named, observable input?

conclusion.verdict: reject rule; rewrite signal as observable input + named source
reject rule; require recorded-call evidence; rule unenforceable without it

branch.question: signal value meets/exceeds threshold per comparator?

conclusion.verdict: apply default_action: proceed (+buffer%) | pause | escalate_to_legal — per rule
no buffer; record in review_log; review on next failure

text.example: signal=Annex-III high-risk (named) → threshold=true (boolean) → counsel-memo-2026-04 attached → fires → default_action=proceed +30% buffer.
